steps.title: Identify the alignment between sports and host countries
steps.content: The passage explains that demonstration sports showcase sports related to the host country, then names examples: korfball (from the Netherlands) and kyudō (from Japan). The blank sentence says these were chosen for Games in Amsterdam (Netherlands) and Tokyo (Japan)—the sports match their host countries perfectly.

steps.title: Apply the transition that captures appropriateness
steps.content: ”Fittingly” expresses that it's appropriate these sports were chosen for their respective host countries, matching the stated purpose exactly. The other choices don't capture this fit: “additionally” merely adds information, while “by contrast” and “nevertheless” wrongly suggest contradiction. That matches choice C — C is correct.
